evalAfter: (async () => { const vj = await fetch('https://levo19.github.io/MOS/version.json?bust=' + Date.now()).then(r=>r.json()).catch(()=>null); const m = (id) => !!document.getElementById(id); const q = (sel) => !!document.querySelector(sel); return { versionServida: vj && vj.version, marcadores: { modalSatelite: m('modalSatelite'), satBody: m('satBody'), qpTramosBanner: m('qpTramosBanner'), qpMembretesSw: m('qpMembretesSw'), anGrupoSec: m('anGrupoSec'), prodEnvasableRow: m('prodEnvasableRow'), prodTipoBar: m('prodTipoBar'), sunatUnSelector: m('prodTipoIGV'), camaraBuscador: !!document.querySelector('.cat-search-wrap .btn-cam-scan'), camaraModalProducto: !!document.querySelector('#modalProducto .btn-cam-scan'), cssRotChip: [...document.styleSheets].some(s=>{try{return [...s.cssRules].some(r=>r.cssText && r.cssText.includes('rot-chip'))}catch(_){return false}}), cssHitPulse: [...document.styleSheets].some(s=>{try{return [...s.cssRules].some(r=>r.cssText && r.cssText.includes('cathitpulse'))}catch(_){return false}}), cssPoptHero: [...document.styleSheets].some(s=>{try{return [...s.cssRules].some(r=>r.cssText && r.cssText.includes('popt-hero'))}catch(_){return false}}), cssReducedMotion: [...document.styleSheets].some(s=>{try{return [...s.cssRules].some(r=>r.cssText && r.cssText.includes('prefers-reduced-motion') && r.cssText.includes('rot-chip'))}catch(_){return false}}), modalPrecioViejoELIMINADO: !m('modalPrecio'), fnScanCodigo: typeof MOS !== 'undefined' && typeof MOS.scanCodigo === 'function', fnPlusContextual: typeof MOS !== 'undefined' && typeof MOS.abrirPlusContextual === 'function', fnGuardarSatelite: typeof MOS !== 'undefined' && typeof MOS.guardarSatelite === 'function', fnAgTab: typeof MOS !== 'undefined' && typeof MOS._agTab === 'function', fnMuertaAbrirModalPrecio: typeof MOS !== 'undefined' && MOS.abrirModalPrecio === undefined, fnMuertaSetCatTab: typeof MOS !== 'undefined' && MOS.setCatTab === undefined } }; })()
